name: text-wrap

        return {'wrapped': wrapped, 'lines': len(wrapped.splitlines())}

name: string-similarity
body:
r = difflib.SequenceMatcher(None, text1, text2).ratio()
        return {'ratio': round(r, 4), 'percent': round(r * 100, 1)}

name: word-count
body:
words = text.split()
        chars = len(text)
        sentences = len(re.split(r'[.!?]+', text))
        paragraphs = len([p for p in text.split('\n\n') if p.strip()])
        return {'words': len(words), 'characters': chars, 'sentences': sentences, 'paragraphs': paragraphs}
